title: The Mines
description: A Dominion-owned mining operation built into canyon walls.

title: Sector 9
description: Overgrown ruins of an abandoned Dominion shipping sector, reclaimed by swamp and resonance.

title: The Spire
description: A massive vertical city, dominated by synthetic skies and heavy surveillance.

title: The Foundry
description: A furnace world of slag pits, pressure doors, and Deep-Core engine yards.

title: The Void
description: The Dominion Orbital Ring, where Project Harmony is becoming something colder than control.

title: The Source
description: Reality beyond the Tear, where memory, emotion, and physical law collapse into the same raw signal.

title: The Astra
description: The crew's mobile home aboard a repaired Dominion survey vessel.
